features.name: feedback loop between clocked and combinational always blocks
features.description: Code should include a feedback loop where a combinational always block reads a register updated by a clocked always block, and the combinational block's output feeds back to that register

features.name: async reset clocked register with initial value
features.description: Code should include a register with asynchronous reset and an explicit initial value assigned within the same always block

features.name: wire arithmetic assignment in combinational logic
features.description: Code should include a wire that receives an arithmetic subtraction result from a combinational expression involving registers

features.name: combinational always block with conditional branching
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block with if-else branching that assigns values based on register comparisons
